case_title: O'MARA, JENNIFER E. VS HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT - et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,714.00 FILED BY O'MARA, JENNIFER E. AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT - -  SYSTEMS C/O MICHELLE HORNEFF LAPIDOS, JACK TAISCH, ELIZABETH ANN (COLDWELL BANKER) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-29-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO OCT-13-2004 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S REQUEST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'MARA, JENNIFER E. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT - -  SYSTEMS C/O MICHELLE HORNEFF LAPIDOS, JACK TAISCH, ELIZABETH ANN (COLDWELL BANKER) $118.62 PRINCIPAL, $112.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $230.62, AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT COVERS THE ADDITIONAL GAS AND ELECTRICITY COSTS TO PLAINTIFF FROM 01-01-04 THROUGH 03-05-04. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LAPIDOS, JACK
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HORNEFF WADDLE CORP. DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT -
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-23-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-14-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 MEDIATED SETTLEMENT; IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
DEFT DID NOT COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF MEDIATED AGREEMENT OF 3-23-04. DEFT TO COMPLETE ALL TERMS OF AGREEMENT BY 11-2-04 @ 1:30, FURTHER PROGRESS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF

REPORT IN THIS MATTER. PLTF TO BRING ESTIMATES OF FURTHER DAMAGES DUE TO ADDITIONAL UTILITY COSTS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-17-2004, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAR-23-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PLFT & DEFT APPEARED ON 9/8/04 @ 3:30PM PER ORDER OF COMMISSIONER BUT FOLDER WAS IN CHAMBER. NO CON'T WAS SENT OUT FOR COURT DATE OF 9/8/04.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-02-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE HEARING IS DENIED. THE CASE REMAINED ON THE 10-13-04 DATE BEC THE REQUEST WAS NOT FILED AT LEAST 10 DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING & GOOD CAUSE WAS NOT SHOWN FOR THE LATE REQUEST.
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-11-2004 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 IF NO APPEARANCES, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.

DEFENDANT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE TO BE SIGNED BY JUDGE, $10.00 FEE PAID.
